src: A small, fluffy white dog with tightly curled fur, large dark eyes, black nose, and a collar with a patterned tag. It has droopy ears.
edit: A blocky Minecraft-style poodle, made with pixelated blocks in white and cream shades, with cubical shapes. It has a collar as a dark line with a pixelated tag, square eyes, and a rigid block tail.

per_image_non_shared_src.00: The animal is viewed from above, standing on earthy ground with fallen leaves and twigs, body angled left under sunlight filtering through dense foliage.
per_image_non_shared_src.01: The animal sits upright sideways on a rocky slope, surrounded by green bushes and a clear blue sky, with scattered rocks and uneven ground.
per_image_non_shared_src.02: an animal viewed from above, stands alert on a rocky shoreline with smooth round pebbles, beside a flowing river. Human legs with shoes and shorts are partially visible in the background.
per_image_non_shared_src.03: The animal is viewed from the side, mid-motion on a rugged rocky surface by eroded stone cliffs, with rough, earthy textures. A bright day illuminates the setting.
per_image_non_shared_src.04: an animal runs towards the camera on a flat rocky shore with puddles of water; a blurry figure stands in shallow sea waves.
per_image_non_shared_src.05: The animal rests on a blue and white patterned blanket, showing its upper body in soft folds; background is neutral.

per_image_non_shared_edit.00: The animal is viewed from above, standing on snow-covered ground with patches of ice and twigs, angled left. Pale light filters through barren branches, contrasting with its silhouette and visible breath in a serene winter scene.
per_image_non_shared_edit.01: An animal sits upright sideways on a snowy slope with bare, snow-dusted bushes, under a pale winter sky. Scattered frost-coated stones are on the uneven, snow-covered ground transforming the rocky terrain into a winter landscape.
per_image_non_shared_edit.02: The animal is viewed from above, standing on a snow-dusted shoreline with icy pebbles below. Beside it, a river flows quietly with a partially frozen surface. In the background, human legs in boots and shorts are visible.
per_image_non_shared_edit.03: The animal is viewed from the side, mid-motion on a snow-covered rocky surface by stone cliffs. Ice glistens on the rocks, and visible breath creates small clouds on a bright winter day.
per_image_non_shared_edit.04: A lone animal dashes across a snowy, rocky shore, leaving tracks. Puddles have thin ice, reflecting pale light. In the distance, a blurry figure stands in the sea with cold swells. Snowflakes drift, creating a monochrome winter scene.
per_image_non_shared_edit.05: The animal rests on a snowflake-patterned blanket of icy blue and frosty white, surrounded by folds resembling snow. The background is chilly whites and grays, resembling a serene winter landscape with a subtle frosty ambiance.
